title: Mini Swords
description: Makes all swords smaller, while staying consistent with the original design!
body: ![Mini sword textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce721b1f757efcdf8e2101cd36328caf0d5dcc6c.png)Mini Swords is a simple, lightweight resource pack that tweaks the texture of all swords so that they appear slightly shorter on screen and in the inventory, while perfectly maintaining the classic Minecraft style.
